user.title: Connect to Felicity HVC96050 BMS
user.description: Enter the connection details for the ESPHome device connected to your Felicity battery.

data.password: API password (leave empty if not set)

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect. Check that the device is online and the host/port are correct.
error.invalid_auth: Authentication failed. Check the API password.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs.
